{{nihongo|'''Narukamino Shrine'''|鳴雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[the Imperial Palace]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} ** Series ordinal: 12 * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha|WD=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180566</ref> * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062|1=Engishiki seat}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180566</ref> ** Series ordinal: 25 * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|WD=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}
== part of (P361) ==
* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|lt=List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|ja|宮中・京中の式内社一覧|simple|List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|WD=Q11453224|1=List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace}} ** Series ordinal: 12 ** P155: {{ill|Sakatonono Shrine|lt=Sakatonono Shrine|WD=Q135021842|1=Sakatonono Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Futonotonomikotono Shrine|lt=Futonotonomikotono Shrine|WD=Q135021845|1=Futonotonomikotono Shrine}}
== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==
